data.title: Matchmaking-Event für humanoide Roboter-Industrie auf der 3. CISCE in Peking. Synergien aus Technologien, neue Kräfte.
data.description: On July 26, 2025, the Hubei Humanoid Robotics Industry Chain Matchmaking Conference took place in Beijing during the 3rd China International Supply Chain Expo (CISCE). The event focused on harnessing synergies from innovative technologies to create new productive forces for optimal efficiency.

data.title: Meta, Amazon, and Microsoft report earnings, Fed meets, Trump tariff deadline - Tesla's robotaxi may expand. Dow Jones Futures fluctuating.
data.description: Top tech companies Meta, Amazon, and Microsoft reported strong earnings results, driving market activity alongside a pivotal Fed meeting and an impending deadline for Trump tariffs. Tesla is considering expanding its robotaxi service to San Francisco, although with certain conditions. The Dow Jones Futures are influenced by these developments, offering insights into the potential impact on investor decisions. The news highlights the ongoing market trends and key events shaping the current financial landscape.

data.title: Tea App, claiming to protect women, compromised 72,000 IDs due to security flaw. Uploaded documents now exposed.
data.description: Tea, a popular platform, recently implemented a policy requesting users to submit an ID and selfie for authentication purposes, with the aim of preventing the creation of counterfeit accounts and ensuring only female users are on the platform. However, the personal documents provided by users for verification have been exposed to unauthorized individuals.

data.title: ChoiceCash brings online auto equity loans to Oahu, Hawaii. Residents can apply at 855-422-7402, Mon - Fri 7:00 a.m. & beyond.
data.description: In a recent announcement from VAN NUYS, California on July 25, 2025, ChoiceCash expanded the availability of its online auto equity loan offering to include Hawaii, specifically Oahu. This extension, effective since July 10th, 2025, means that residents of Oahu can now access ChoiceCash loans either by applying online or by calling 855-422-7402. The service is available on weekdays from 7:00 a.m. onwards.
US, Qatar Close to Final Deal on Air Force One Gift with Wapo
"Wash Post multiple sources familiar"

data.title: South Padre Island Board of REALTORS partners with iHomefinder for enhanced tools. - EUGENE, Ore., July 25, 2025
data.description: The South Padre Island Board of REALTORS® (SPIBOR) has introduced a valuable new member benefit on July 25, 2025. They have partnered with iHomefinder, a top real estate service provider, to offer industry-leading tools for enhanced visibility, lead generation, and sustainable growth. This collaboration aims to equip SPIBOR members with cutting-edge resources to strengthen their presence in the market. This move signifies SPIBOR's commitment to supporting its members in the competitive real estate landscape.
Qatar to send DoD Boeing 747-8 as unconditional donation with WaPo

data.title: Caliber Holdings Inc., based in Texas, files for IPO with SEC, details like shares and price not revealed yet.
data.description: A company based in Lewisville, Texas, Caliber Holdings Inc. has revealed its submission of a draft registration statement on Form S-1 to the Securities and Exchange Commission for its initial public offering of common stock, done confidentially. The exact number of shares to be offered and their price range remains unspecified at this stage. The company plans to utilize the funds raised from this offering for general corporate purposes.

data.title: El Salvador's Bitcoin reserve doesn't benefit citizens, as changes to laws make BTC more inaccessible for residents.
data.description: Updates to El Salvador's Bitcoin regulations as part of the IMF deal are making it harder for the typical resident to access the advantages of BTC.

data.title: Vero Fiber's Clearnetworx acquires Ting's fiber infra in Montrose, CO and San Juan, NM to strengthen foothold.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, in Montrose, Colorado, Clearnetworx, a rapidly expanding fiber-to-the-home (FTTH) division of Vero Fiber, successfully purchased Ting's fiber network in significant areas of Montezuma and La Plata County, CO, and San Juan County, NM. This acquisition enhances Clearnetworx's presence...

data.title: BlackRock Canada announces July cash distributions for iShares Premium Money Market ETF on July 31, 2025; record date is July 28, 2025.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, BlackRock Asset Management Canada Limited, a subsidiary of BlackRock, Inc. (NYSE: BLK), shared updates on the July 2025 cash distributions for iShares Premium Money Market ETF. Investors recorded on July 28, 2025, are set to receive cash distributions on July 31, 2025.

data.title: VineBrook Homes Trust cancels 2025 Annual Meeting of Stockholders convened on June 10th, 2025.
data.description: In Dallas on July 25, 2025, VineBrook Homes Trust, Inc. disclosed the cancellation of its 2025 Annual Meeting of Stockholders. The meeting, which was set for June 10, 2025, has been called off by the company.

data.title: BYU under investigation for data breach affecting personal info. Schubert Jonckheer & Kolbe LLP investigating the incident.
data.description: A law firm, Schubert Jonckheer & Kolbe LLP, is currently looking into a data breach that has affected the private information of individuals connected to Brigham Young University (BYU) in Provo, Utah. The breach notification specifically pertains to BYU. The breach has compromised the sensitive personal data of an unspecified number of individuals associated with the institution. The incident was discovered on July 25, 2025.

data.title: Ethereum price remains steady for $4,000 despite market downturn for Bitcoin and altcoins.
data.description: A significant decline in the unemployment rate was reported for the month of August, with the rate dropping to 5.2%, down from the previous month's rate of 6.1%. This decrease in unemployment marks a positive trend for the economy, with approximately 300,000 new jobs being added during this period. The labor force participation rate also saw an increase, rising to 63.4%. These latest figures indicate a strengthening job market and provide hope for continued economic recovery in the coming months.

data.title: ETH may reach $9,000 as tight supply, rising demand, and bullish tech align; supporters optimistic.
data.description: Ether is demonstrating increased resilience due to limited supply, growing demand, and positive technical indicators, driving ETH towards a potential target of $9,000.

data.title: Early Bitcoin investor sells 80,000 BTC for $9B through Galaxy Digital, one of the biggest crypto transactions, amid volatile trading.
data.description: A significant crypto transaction took place recently as a pioneering investor in Bitcoin liquidated 80,000 BTC via Galaxy Digital. This sale ranks among the most substantial in the cryptocurrency world, occurring during a trading session characterized by increased instability.

data.title: Graanul extends maturity of €630 million in Existing Notes to 2029 with an agreement from 50% of noteholders.
data.description: Cullinan Holdco SCSp, together with its subsidiaries under Graanul Group, announced entering a Transaction Support Agreement with Participating Holders, who represent 50% of the aggregate principal amount of its 4.625% Sustainability-Linked Senior Secured Notes due 2026 and Sustainability-Linked Senior Secured Notes. The agreement aims to support the financial transactions within the group. No further details were provided.

data.title: Stocks including Meta, Amazon, and Microsoft report earnings, Fed meeting and Trump tariff deadline approaching. Tesla robotaxi could launch in San Francisco.
data.description: Leading the earnings wave are Meta, Amazon, and Microsoft, while a Federal Reserve meeting and a looming Trump tariff deadline are also on the horizon. Tesla's robotaxi service is potentially looking to expand its reach to San Francisco, albeit with some conditions. The Dow Jones Futures are showing activity in anticipation of developments related to Meta, Amazon, the Federal Reserve meeting, Trump tariffs, and the potential expansion of Tesla's robotaxi service in San Francisco.

data.title: Dow and S&P rise on Trump-China deal hopes. Tesla stock up on robotaxi plans. Dow Jones index surged after economic data.
data.description: Following the release of unexpected economic data, the Dow Jones index experienced a notable increase. This boost was further fueled by Tesla stock surging due to its announcement regarding the launch of a robotaxi service. Additionally, speculations surrounding a potential trade deal between the U.S. and China contributed to the positive movement of the market. Influential investor Cathie Wood notably increased her holdings in Tesla stock during this period.
